LanguageData.AreaToStayTooltip: This is where guests may sleep and unwind between games, meals, and tours.
LanguageData.BedSatisfiedTitles: These titles will accept this suite:
LanguageData.CommandBedSetAsGuestDesc: Whether this bed is reserved for paying guests.
LanguageData.GuestsWelcomeTooltip: If you turn this off, no new patron parties will arrive at this colony.
LanguageData.Hospitality_VendingMachineToggleDesc: Allow patrons to use this amenity.
LanguageData.TryRecruitTooltip: Your casino hosts will try to introduce this patron to your colonists and build lasting goodwill. Skilled hosts are more effective, while poor hosts may sour the mood.
LanguageData.VisitorsLeavingAwful: They left convinced this place falls well short of proper casino standards. (Score: {1})
LanguageData.VisitorsLeavingBad: The house failed to impress them. (Score: {1})
LanguageData.VisitorsLeavingGood: They enjoyed their stay and left impressed with the house. (Score: {1})
LanguageData.VisitorsLeavingGreat: They were dazzled by the standards of your establishment. (Score: {1})
